scripts.dev: concurrently --names "target,agent,dashboard" --prefix-colors "red,blue,green" "cd apps/target && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --port 8000 --reload" "cd apps/agent && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --port 8001 --reload" "pnpm --filter dashboard dev"
scripts.install:python: cd apps/agent && uv sync && cd ../target && uv sync
